# vanta_tests (Data Source)

List Vanta tests, optionally filtered by status, framework, or integration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Tests that currently need attention.
data "vanta_tests" "failing" {
  status_filter = "NEEDS_ATTENTION"
}

output "failing_test_names" {
  value = [for t in data.vanta_tests.failing.tests : t.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `framework_filter` (String) Filter by framework.
- `integration_filter` (String) Filter by integration.
- `status_filter` (String) Filter by test status (e.g. `OK`, `NEEDS_ATTENTION`, `DEACTIVATED`).

### Read-Only

- `tests` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tests))

<a id="nestedatt--tests"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tests`

Read-Only:

- `category` (String) Test category.
- `id` (String) Test ID.
- `last_test_run_date` (String) Timestamp of the last test run.
- `name` (String) Test name.
- `status` (String) Test status.
